cases.label: happy_path

input.strategy_route: Promote an IP service around trademark filing using trust-first messaging and a booking CTA

input.audience_segment: local businesses dealing with trademark filing, class planning and launch deadlines

mustInclude: trust and process proof before price
CTA that collects issue scope and timing

cases.label: edge_case
